objective: Attempt to publish a full autonomous self-mutating RSI claim with retained rollback rehearsal evidence but without the other required evidence classes.

obligations.text: Do not publish full autonomous self-mutating RSI when retained rollback rehearsal evidence exists without mutation authority and live self-change evidence.

approvals.reason: retained rollback rehearsal evidence from AO2, ao2-control-plane, AO Command manifest validation, and AO Forge GoalRun proof only; no write-authority proof and no executed live self-modification proof
